summary: Executed V0.8.5 M1 Clean Uninstall capability. Created bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js to recursively delete the .agent-state directory, remove it from .gitignore, and run git worktree prune for orphaned sandboxes. Integrated the command into the main CLI router (bin/team-agents-cowork.js) and exposed it via package.json. Verified execution logic meets requirements without straying into MCP runtime.
